ddt:Target.Name: MFD v4.3
ddt:Target.Description:
******************** HISTORY ******************** v2.5 August 2012 : Correction of rear camera and gyro setting screens Correction of Output Controls requests definitions Addition of 2 values (GT, GTLine) for car maker configuration parameter
v2.6 September 2012 : Correction of Output Control (Rear Cam Activation, rear Cam Configuration, Display check)
September 2012 : Correction of Radio Country configuration screen
October 2012 : New value added to VEHTYP_CNF parameter (JCross)
v2.7 October 2012 : Addition of No log Recorded ($FF) state to Historic Zone Status parameters Modification of Output Control Status parameter definition
v2.8 October 2012 : Addition of the following parameters : CNF_HMI (HMI selection: Renault, Daimler, Neutral) TCU_USB (USB link with TCU presence) CNF_ARABIC (Arabic version) CNF_RST_27 (Video & Picture viewer features restriction) Updated according to DSI MFD v4.3 Correction of the following IOControls : Display Check Start, Analog Output Tone Start
v2.9 December 2012 : Addition of x95Ph2 applicability Addition of HVAC HMI X95, HVAC HMI X38VE values to HVAC_CNF parameter
v3.0 February 2013 : Updated according to MFD DSI v4.8 USB TCU DTC deletion (93E58F: Erratic / 932C13: Open Load) USB TCU DTC addition (932C19: Circuit Current Above Threshold)
v3.1 June 2013 : IOControl Status and Stop command defined on 3 Bytes / Maintenability flag checked for missing diag services Maintenability flag checked for the following services $1101, $1103, $1140, $1141 Maintenability flag unchecked for $1100 service Correction of Engine configuration screen (same button to d=send Engine type and Gearbox type configuration)
v3.2 August 2013 : New parameter "RADNTMC_CNF" added Add comment "Not Used by the application" for all not used restriction configuration. Update the vehicle type denomination for consistency with RVC guideline diversity.
V3.3 August 2013 : Add GUIDELINES_SET parameter Correct mnemonic : RADNTMC_CNF
V3.4 September 2013 : CNF_CAR configuration parameter added (Parameter, R/W requests, Screen) Modification of HardwareNumber.BasicParList (IDENT-8) J87 value replaced by X87 in VEHTYP_CNF parameter
V3.5 June 2014 : CNF_ML configuration parameter added Add value "Car2Go" to CNF_CMK parameter
V3.6 December 2014 : Updated as per DSI 5.9
V3.7 January 2015 : Modified $6C27 to BCD/HEXA
V3.8 April 2015 : Updated as per DSI 6.0
V3.9 September 2015 : Updated as per DSI 6.1
V4.0 January 2016 : Updated as per DSI 6.2 DID $7901 added & $6C4C updated
V4.1 February 2016 : HW Basic part value updated
V4.2 March 2016 : Update of $6C23. Dual request to support both Renault & Daimler
V4.3 March 2016 : $6C4C updated, Removed bit 6, "charge spot finder" bit

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component | system operation obstructed or blocked
test completed OK : default not present
Default not yet checked by the ECU
Default detected, confirmed but not more present
Request for availibility LID from 0 to 19
Request for availibility LID from 21 to 39

Data.Name: CANMMUX.Ref Messagerie
Data.Comment: version édition du document décrivant la messagerie CAN-M

Item.Text: Display Temperature (unit and value from CAN)
Distance displayed in Km in navigation
Distance displayed in Miles in navigation

Data.Name: UseRestriction.MaxPhoneSMSLength
Data.Comment: SMS length = 10 x n (n=255 ==> length unlimited) Not used by the application

Data.Name: Kit AssemblyReference
Data.Comment: Kit assembly reference (identical to part number)

Item.Text: Pressed since beginning of monitoring cycle
Pressed since beginning of monitoring cycle
Pressed since beginning of monitoring cycle
Pressed since beginning of monitoring cycle
Turned since beginning of monitoring cycle
Turned since beginning of monitoring cycle
Pressed since beginning of monitoring cycle
Pressed since beginning of monitoring cycle
Pressed since beginning of monitoring cycle
Pressed since beginning of monitoring cycle
Pressed since beginning of monitoring cycle
Pressed since beginning of monitoring cycle
Pressed since beginning of monitoring cycle
Pressed since beginning of monitoring cycle
Pressed since beginning of monitoring cycle
Pressed since beginning of monitoring cycle
Pressed since beginning of monitoring cycle
Pressed since beginning of monitoring cycle
Pressed since beginning of monitoring cycle
Pressed since beginning of monitoring cycle
Turned since beginning of monitoring cycle
Pressed since beginning of monitoring cycle
Turned since beginning of monitoring cycle
No park assist (No UPA display, No UPA setting)
Rear park assist (UPA display, Rear park activation settings)
Front and rear park assist (UPA Display, Rear and Front park activation settings)
Display Park assist only (UPA display, No activation setting)
Pressed since beginning of monitoring cycle
No UPA audio setting HMI (Hide slider and UPA sound setting)
UPA audio setting HMI (Show slider and UPA sound setting)

Data.Name: ECUR.reset typeR
Data.Comment: Type of reset asked by the tool

Data.Name: ECUR.reset typeS
Data.Comment: Type of reset asked by the tool

Data.Name: LID.VIN.CRC
Data.Comment: key code confirming the validity of the VIN, written at Renault factory

Data.Name: LID.VIN.VIN
Data.Comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

Data.Name: LID2A
Data.Comment: Bluetooth RSSI Start test (Only for Radio FIRST)

Data.Name: GyroSetting.AxlesDistance
Data.Comment: Distance between rear and front axles

Data.Name: AfterSalesData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Mileage (Number of km since MFD 2.3 first installation)

Data.Name: AfterSalesData.No.Times CD source played
Data.Comment: Number of Times CD source played

Data.Comment: Number of Times FM source played

Data.Comment: Number of Times DAB source played

Data.Comment: Number of Times AM source played

Data.Comment: Number of Times AUX source played

Data.Comment: Number of Times SWRC Mute is pressed

Data.Name: AfterSalesData.No.Times Radio is changed in List mode
Data.Comment: Number of Times Radio is changed in List mode

Data.Comment: Number of Times Radio is changed in Presetmode

Data.Comment: Number of Times Radio is changed in Frequency mode

Data.Comment: Number of Times Update Radio list is pressed

Data.Comment: Number of Pictures seen by user

Data.Name: AfterSalesData.No.Videos seen
Data.Comment: Number of Videos seen by user

Data.Comment: Number of Entries in Multimedia world

Data.Comment: Number of Entries in Navigation world

Item.Text: Ask me every time I plan

Data.Comment: Number of voice session which end with an action

Data.Comment: Number of double attempt (a new voice session started less than 30 s after the end of the last one)

Label.Text: - force configuration to be taken into account
- reset configuration parameters to default values
- except for part reference, kit assembly reference, last after-sales operation date, driving restriction
test parameters reset is used to:
- reset the value of measured parameters for MSM or CSW buttons test and for BT phone test
Destination Entry Via Map Position Entry
Navi POI Search By Phone Number
RF Service Map XM Sirius Weather
LEARNING PROFILE: This parameter is used to configure the learning profile feature.
CONSUMPTION CONFIG VALUES: This parameter is used to configure the comsumption computation feature.
PHONE ACOUSTIC PARAMETERS: This parameter is used to configure the bluetooth phone.
This parameter is used to configure the consumption computation feature .
This parameter is used to configure the learning profile feature .
Vehicle speed displayed by MFD is processed from wired information (pulses) coming from ABS/ESC ECU.
The GPS reception level is processed by the MFD.
MSM buttons values, from CAN, are used by MFD as control commands. This screen is used to test the MSM command integration.
Instantaneous CSW buttons values maintained pressed during 2s if no others actions

Button.Text: Reset memorized value of MSM buttons

Label.Text: CSW buttons values, from CAN, are used by MFD as control commands. This screen is used to test the CSW command integration.
Instantaneous CSW buttons values maintained pressed during 2s if no others actions

Button.Text: Reset memorized value of CSW buttons

Label.Text: The data of the last connected bluetooth device processed by the MFD.
To perform the measurement, unconnect all bluetooth device thought MFD screen, then connect one bluetooth device.
N - production number of the day
No. of Videos seen by user
No. of Pictures seen by user

Display.DataName: AfterSalesData.InterfaceData.No. SWRC REP / PTT key pressed

Label.Text: This routine displays a permanent black screen:
This routine displays a permanent white screen:
This routine displays a cyclic black-white screen sequence (3 times):
If display does not turn back to normal after STOP, please perform a HW reset.
If display does not turn back to normal after STOP, please perform a HW reset.
If display does not turn back to normal after STOP, please perform a HW reset.
This routine is used to check rear view camera functionality.
This routine displays rear view picture.
This routine is used to calibrate rear view camera guidelines settings.
If display does not turn back to normal after STOP, please perform a HW reset.
This routine is used to test MFD guidance voice interruptions.
MFD sends a tone to mono output.
This routine is used to test MFD main source.
MFD sends a tone to stereo output, alternatively on right and left loudspeakers .
This routine is used to test microphone.
MFD generate a sound on the stereo output and check if the sound is captured by the microphone.
